further_reading.title: OpenAI Evals
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides concrete patterns for building repeatable evaluation sets and comparing prompt or model changes over time.

further_reading.title: NIST AI RMF Playbook
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful for connecting evaluation, governance, and operational risk controls when deciding what is safe enough to ship.

further_reading.title: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
further_reading.why_relevant: Relevant when turning an eval loop into a production feature because it highlights common LLM security and reliability failure modes.

notes: The module is predominantly pedagogical and uses hypothetical examples rather than factual claims about real incidents, vendors, standards behavior, or measured statistics. No additional inline citation seeds were identified beyond the existing Further Reading resources.
